zh.lifeSummary: 當Alianore de Blancminster於大約1231年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，她的父親William de Blancminster27歲，母親Eve FitzWarin25歲。她於大約1250年與Sir Robert le Strange在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1276年享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alianore de Blancminster于大约1231年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可时，她的父亲William de Blancminster27岁，母亲Eve FitzWarin25岁。她于大约1250年与Sir Robert le Strange在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1276年享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

en.lifeSummary: When Alianore de Blancminster was born about 1231, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Blancminster, was 27 and her mother, Eve FitzWarin, was 25. She married Sir Robert le Strange about 1250, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1276, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alianore de Blancminster est née environ 1231, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Blancminster, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Eve FitzWarin, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert le Strange environ 1250, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1276, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alianore de Blancminster um 1231 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Blancminster 27 und ihre Mutter Eve FitzWarin 25. Sie hat um 1250 in Norfolk, England Sir Robert le Strange geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1276 im Alter von 46 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alianore de Blancminster è nata il circa 1231 nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de Blancminster, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Eve FitzWarin, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert le Strange circa 1250, nel Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1276, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alianore de Blancminsterが約1231年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父William de Blancminsterは27歳，母Eve FitzWarinは25歳であった。約1250年にイギリスノーフォルクでSir Robert le Strangeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1276年に46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alianore de Blancminster(이)가 대략 1231년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Blancminster(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eve FitzWarin(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1250년 영국 노르폴크에서 Sir Robert le Strange(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1276년 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alianore de Blancminster nasceu aproximadamente 1231, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Blancminster, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Eve FitzWarin, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert le Strange aproximadamente 1250, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1276, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alianore de Blancminster родилась около 1231 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Blancminster было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Eve FitzWarin, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert le Strange около 1250 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1276 г. в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alianore de Blancminster nació aproximadamente 1231, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Blancminster, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Eve FitzWarin, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir Robert le Strange aproximadamente 1250, en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1276, a la edad de 46 años.
